Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava

Class PureJavaZenohPublisher

java.lang.Object
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.PureJavaZenohPublisher
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class PureJavaZenohPublisher extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Pure-Java Zenoh 1.x publisher client. No JNI. No native binaries. Zero runtime dependencies beyond JDK 17.

Facade over ZenohSession + the Transport implementations (TcpTransport, TlsTransport, WsTransport) that mirrors the shape of the JNI-backed io.mdudel.zenoh.ZenohClient in the sibling module — switching between the two at a call site is a one-line change.

Endpoint syntax

The connectEndpoint builder value accepts either the standard Zenoh proto/host:port form (matching the JNI publisher) or a full URI:

  • tcp/host:port → TcpTransport
  • tls/host:port → TlsTransport (requires TLS builder args)
  • ws/host:port → WsTransport plaintext (routes as ws://host:port)
  • wss/host:port → WsTransport TLS (routes as wss://host:port)
  • ws://host:port/path, wss://host:port/path — full URI variants

Threading

  • start() single-threaded (call once).
  • publish(byte[]) safe from any thread — delegates to ZenohSession.publish(String, byte[]) which is lock-free at the session layer.
  • close() idempotent from any thread.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    PureJavaZenohPublisher.Builder
    Fluent builder mirroring the shape of io.mdudel.zenoh.ZenohClient.Builder so switching between the JNI-backed and pure-Java publishers is a one-line change at the call site.

    Publish to the base key expression (with any org prefix).

    Publish to effectiveKeyExpr/subKey if subKey is non-null and non-empty, otherwise to the base key.

    Publish a UTF-8 string with the Zenoh string encoding tag.

    Build the transport for connectEndpoint, run the four-message INIT/OPEN handshake, and enter the publish-ready state.

    Stop the session, close the transport.

    • builder

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception
      CLI: publish one payload and exit. Same defaults as the JNI sibling.

      Usage:

       java -jar target/java-zenoh-publisher-pure-*.jar
 java -jar target/java-zenoh-publisher-pure-*.jar tcp/router:7447 my/key
 java -jar target/java-zenoh-publisher-pure-*.jar tcp/router:7447 my/key "hello"
      Throws:
      Exception
